briefdescription.para: This function handles Reduced Block Command (RBC) requests from the host.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to XUsbPs instance of the controller.
is the number of the endpoint on which the RBC was received.
is the data buffer containing the RBC or data.
is the length of the data buffer.

briefdescription.para: This function handles a Storage Class Setup request from the host.

detaileddescription.para: This function is called by Chapter9 handler when class request is received from Host.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to XUsbPs instance of the controller.
is the setup data structure containing the setup request.

briefdescription.para: This file contains the implementation of the storage class code for the example.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a wgr 10/10/10 First release 2.1 kpc 4/28/14 Align DMA buffers to cache line boundary 2.4 vak 4/01/19 Fixed IAR data_alignment warnings 2.10 ka 8/21/25 Fixed GCC warnings 2.11 ka 01/29/26 Fix codespell errors. *
